description: YouTube channels for informal spoken-language training data. Run fetch_yt_transcripts.py with this file to download and transcribe. All channels selected for informal, conversational speech — NO news or formal education.

channels.name: My Village Show
channels.content: Village life, culture, comedy — natural Telangana spoken Telugu
channels.why: Authentic village/working-class Telangana Telugu speech patterns, minimal scripting

channels.name: Dhethadi (Tamada Media)
channels.why: Natural Telangana urban speech, informal conversations

channels.name: Mahathalli
channels.why: Hyderabadi Telugu spoken patterns, Urdu-Hindi mix

channels.name: Wirally
channels.why: Mix of Hyderabadi and Coastal AP Telugu speech

channels.name: Nakkalites
channels.why: Authentic Coimbatore Tamil speech — soft 'nga' suffix, musical tone

channels.name: Eruma Saani
channels.why: Coimbatore friends group — natural West TN spoken Tamil

channels.name: Mic Set
channels.why: Fast-paced Chennai Tamil, Madras bashai, street-level speech

channels.name: Sothanaigal
channels.why: Everyday Tamil conversations across different social situations

channels.name: North Karnataka / Hubli vlogs
channels.search_query: north karnataka hubli dharwad vlog kannada youtube
channels.content: Daily life vlogs from North Karnataka
channels.why: Authentic North Karnataka dialect — Hubli/Dharwad speech patterns
channels.note: Search YouTube for this — specific channels vary. Filter: <15min, no news

channels.name: Coastal Karnataka vlogs
channels.search_query: coastal karnataka mangalore udupi vlog kannada youtube
channels.why: Coastal Karnataka speech — Tulu influence, slower rhythm
channels.note: Search YouTube for this — specific channels vary. Filter: <15min, no news

channels.name: Madurai Tamil comedy
channels.search_query: madurai tamil comedy youtube short film 2024
channels.why: Rustic South Tamil — Madurai vowel elongation, hard consonants
channels.note: Search YouTube for this — specific channels vary. Filter: <15min, no news

channels.name: Rayalaseema Telugu content
channels.search_query: rayalaseema telugu comedy youtube kurnool kadapa
channels.note: Search YouTube for this — specific channels vary. Filter: <15min, no news

filters.notes: Prefer: comedy skits, vlogs, short films, daily life. Skip: news, formal lectures, devotional
